dorks.name: API keys / tokens
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"api_key" OR intext:"api_token" OR intext:"access_token" OR intext:"bearer ")

dorks.name: DB connection strings
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"jdbc:" OR intext:"mongodb://" OR intext:"postgres://" OR intext:"mysql://")

dorks.name: GitHub PAT / fine-grained tokens
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"ghp_" OR intext:"github_pat_" OR intext:"ghs_" OR intext:"gho_")

dorks.name: Private keys (RSA/SSH/PGP)
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY" OR intext:"BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY" OR intext:"BEGIN PRIVATE KEY" OR intext:"BEGIN PGP PRIVATE")

dorks.name: Slack tokens
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"xoxb-" OR intext:"xoxa-" OR intext:"xoxp-" OR intext:"xoxs-")

dorks.name: Email containers (PST/MBOX/MSG/EML)
dorks.query: site:example.com (ext:pst OR ext:mbox OR ext:msg OR ext:eml)

dorks.name: GitHub - secrets
dorks.query: site:github.com "example.com" (password OR api_key OR token OR secret)

dorks.name: Config files
dorks.query: site:example.com (ext:htaccess OR ext:conf OR ext:config OR ext:ini OR ext:yaml OR ext:yml)

dorks.name: Generic secret leakage patterns
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"private_token" OR intext:"refresh_token" OR intext:"auth_token" OR intext:"session_secret")

dorks.name: Passwords in text
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"password" OR intext:"passwd" OR intext:"motdepasse" OR intext:"mot de passe")

dorks.name: Backup files
dorks.query: site:example.com (ext:bak OR ext:backup OR ext:old OR ext:save OR ext:swp)

dorks.name: Compressed archives
dorks.query: site:example.com (ext:zip OR ext:rar OR ext:7z OR ext:tar OR ext:gz OR ext:tgz)

dorks.name: PDFs flagged confidential
dorks.query: site:example.com filetype:pdf (intext:confidential OR intext:confidentiel OR intext:internal OR intext:"do not distribute" OR intext:"usage interne")

dorks.name: Admin panels
dorks.query: site:example.com (inurl:admin OR inurl:administrator OR inurl:backend OR inurl:dashboard)

dorks.name: Monitoring stacks (Grafana/Kibana/Prometheus)
dorks.query: site:example.com (inurl:grafana OR inurl:kibana OR inurl:prometheus OR inurl:9090 OR intitle:"Grafana")

dorks.name: Verbose error messages
dorks.query: site:example.com (intext:"SQL syntax" OR intext:"fatal error" OR intext:"stack trace" OR intext:"warning: include")

dorks.name: Webcam / IoT panels
dorks.query: site:example.com (inurl:axis-cgi OR intitle:"camera" OR intitle:"webcam" OR inurl:viewerframe)

dorks.name: Emails in documents
dorks.query: site:example.com (filetype:pdf OR filetype:docx OR filetype:xlsx) intext:"@example.com"

dorks.name: Dev / staging / preprod
dorks.query: site:*.example.com (inurl:dev OR inurl:staging OR inurl:test OR inurl:preprod OR inurl:uat OR inurl:recette)

dorks.name: Login pages
dorks.query: site:example.com (inurl:login OR inurl:signin OR inurl:auth OR intitle:"login")

dorks.name: Swagger / API docs exposed
dorks.query: site:example.com (inurl:swagger OR inurl:api-docs OR inurl:redoc OR inurl:graphql)

dorks.name: Webmail interfaces (Roundcube/Zimbra/OWA)
dorks.query: site:example.com (inurl:roundcube OR inurl:webmail OR inurl:owa OR inurl:zimbra)

dorks.name: All Office files (broad enumeration)
dorks.query: site:example.com (filetype:doc OR filetype:docx OR filetype:xls OR filetype:xlsx OR filetype:ppt OR filetype:pptx)

dorks.name: Contact / team pages
dorks.query: site:example.com (inurl:contact OR inurl:team OR inurl:about OR inurl:staff OR inurl:equipe)

dorks.name: All images (potential EXIF metadata)
dorks.query: site:example.com (filetype:jpg OR filetype:jpeg OR filetype:png OR filetype:tiff)
